patientLookupEmail.title: Patient email address (lookup identifier)
patientLookupEmail.description: The patient's email address used only as a lookup key to find their Person Account. This is NOT an outbound email message and this action does NOT send email. Pass a single plain email address string in the form name@example.com (for example priya.sharma@example.com). Do NOT pass a JSON object, a Map, or any wrapper. Do NOT include recipientId, recipient, to, cc, bcc, from, subject, body, or message. Do NOT construct an email payload of any kind. If the user provided their email earlier in the conversation, copy that plain string verbatim. Never a Salesforce Account Id.

includePast.title: Include Past
includePast.description: Whether to include completed or cancelled visits alongside upcoming ones. Pass true by default and when the user says "all my appointments", "my appointments", "upcoming and past", "list everything", or does not specify a time scope. Pass false only when the user explicitly asks for "only upcoming" or "future only". If omitted, the action defaults to true.
